lines.speaker: Stonemason
lines.text: Hello. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure. Do you have anything for sale?

lines.speaker: Stonemason
lines.text: I'm afraid not. All the recent chaos has caused a lot of supply issues. It will be a long time before things are properly back to normal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's a shame. Never mind then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: : Are you one of the returned citizens?

lines.speaker: Stone mason
lines.text: : Why, yes. You must be the adventurer who Maisa talked to us about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: : That would be me. Now, can you help me?

lines.speaker: Stone mason
lines.text: : Probably not; I'm a stone mason and have little to offer an adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: : You know what would be brilliant?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: : Could you make some granite armour or alter granite armour to better fit me?

lines.speaker: Stone mason
lines.text: : I'm afraid I can't do that, sorry. In the blazing desert sun, granite armour isn't very popular so I haven't had any experience of working with it.

lines.speaker: Stone mason
lines.text: : Once the place is a bit less chaotic, however, I will try to think of ways you adventurers can help. Who knows what I'll come up with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: : Should I come back soon, then?

lines.speaker: Stone mason
lines.text: : I wouldn't hold my breath. I'm thinking it will be months before I have work for you rather than a few days.
